title: In AI blunder, more than 34,000 Instagram accounts were attacked
description: The flaw, which Meta said it had fixed, allowed anyone to take over accounts using a bug in the company's new artificial intelligence software.
content:
SAN FRANCISCO: Late last month, the former White House social media account for President Barack Obama suddenly began posting odd things on its Instagram page.

title: Driven Summer Tax Crackdown on Tourism Sector
description: Greece's independent tax authority has launched a round-the-clock summer enforcement blitz powered by artificial intelligence and more than 300,000 citizen whistleblowers targeting tax evasion in the tourism sector.
content:

title: Japan's support crucial in Malaysia's push into advanced technology, says PM

title: CrowdStrike warns of increasing Chinese AI cyberattacks on U.S. tech
description: U.S. cybersecurity giant CrowdStrike said China-based entities made over half of state-sponsored cyberattacks on tech firms for artificial intelligence assets.
content:
U.S.-based cybersecurity giant CrowdStrike warned Tuesday of increasing cyberattacks from China-based entities aimed at stealing artificial intelligence to narrow the tech gap with the U.S.

title: Anthropic releases Mythos-like model without cyber capabilities
